description: Through-transmission C-scan of a bonded doubler in plan view: datum corner + mm axes, faint fastener row, dB-loss color bar, sub-threshold speckle and five disbond indications (one oversize mid-panel, one small near the edge). Four acceptance checks overlay in narration order: cyan record tags D1-D5 (>= 6 mm threshold, speckle stays untagged), dashed O25 single-size limit ring with caliper reading O34 OVER, cumulative-density readout chip (3.8% vs 5% limit), and hatched 13 mm edge zone that flags the small edge indication REJECT.
